hero.desc: Fine lines, sagging, dull skin, and tired-looking eyes build up quietly, then suddenly feel obvious in photos and mirrors. At Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur, anti aging therapy is a personalised plan, not a random menu of treatments.
hero.address: LG 10, Lower Ground Floor, Wisma UOA II, Jalan Pinang, 50450 Kuala Lumpur

trust.t2: Personalised anti aging programmes using non-surgical face lift techniques
trust.t3: Focus on non-surgical aesthetic procedures and advanced laser treatments
trust.t4: Safety-first mindset with MOH guidance and LCP pathway

whatIs.desc: Anti aging therapy is not about "stopping time." It's about improving the things that make you look tired or older than you feel.
whatIs.c3: volume loss in cheeks and under-eyes
whatIs.c5: large pores, rough texture, acne marks
whatIs.planTitle: A good plan does two things:
whatIs.plan2Desc: collagen, texture, volume, and expression lines

whyFaster.title: Why Skin Ages Faster in Malaysia
whyFaster.desc: Malaysia's sun and heat are not gentle. UV exposure is a major driver of premature ageing, and daily sunscreen helps prevent wrinkles and age spots linked to unprotected UV exposure.
whyFaster.f2: high screen time (sleep disruption and dull skin)
whyFaster.note: So the best anti aging treatment in Malaysia is usually a mix of prevention + collagen support + targeted correction.

treatments.subtitle: What's Commonly Used in KL, and How It Feels
treatments.t1Best: forehead lines, frown lines, crow's feet
treatments.t1Downtime: low, maybe mild swelling or bruising
treatments.t2Best: under-eyes, cheeks, smile lines, chin, jawline balance
treatments.t2Longevity: months, varies by area and product
treatments.t3Best: mild to moderate sagging, jawline, cheeks, brows
treatments.t4Best: pores, acne scars, fine lines, texture, firmness

naturalResults.title: Natural Results You Can Expect
naturalResults.desc: The goal is softer movement and smoother lines, not no expression.

consultation.title: What to Expect at Your Consultation
consultation.s1: You explain what bothers you (photos help)
consultation.s2: The doctor checks skin quality, facial structure, and movement lines
consultation.s3: You get a plan that matches your budget, timeline, and comfort level
consultation.s4: You understand downtime and aftercare before you commit

cost.title: Cost of Anti Aging Therapy in Malaysia
cost.subtitle: Kuala Lumpur Price Reality
cost.budgetDesc: Ask the clinic to break it into: "today" (quick win), "next 3 months" (collagen plan), and "maintenance" (how often you'll repeat).

faq.q1: What is the best anti aging treatment in Malaysia?
faq.a1: The best treatment depends on your specific concerns. A combination of prevention, collagen support, and targeted correction usually works best.
faq.q2: When should I start anti aging treatments?
faq.a2: Many clinics frame it as prevention first, then correction. Some people start in their late 20s or early 30s with skincare and gentle treatments, and add devices or injectables when signs become visible.
faq.a3: Yes. Sunscreen helps prevent premature skin ageing like wrinkles and age spots caused by UV exposure.
faq.a4: Commonly about 3 to 4 months, with full effect developing over about 2 weeks.
faq.q5: Will Botox make my face look frozen?
faq.a5: It shouldn't when done conservatively and placed correctly. The goal is softer movement and smoother lines, not no expression.
faq.a6: Many Malaysia-based clinic resources describe HIFU results lasting around 12 to 18 months for many people, with maintenance depending on age and skin condition.
faq.a7: Sensitivity varies. Many people describe it as warm or tingly with short bursts. Clinics often adjust settings for comfort.
faq.q8: What is better: HIFU or RF microneedling?
faq.a8: They do different jobs. HIFU targets deeper lifting and tightening. RF microneedling is strong for pores, texture, acne scars, and collagen remodeling.
faq.q9: How many sessions do I need?
faq.a9: It depends. HIFU may be 1 session with maintenance later, while RF microneedling and lasers often work best as a series.

cta.title: Ready for Your Personalised Plan?
